taskCaption: item starts outside (far from) the drawer and is placed inside it (placed-from-outside diagnostic)

pilotMetadata.tests: Asserts, via the FROZEN matcher: the item's TERMINAL relation to the container is INSIDE (hard OBJECT_RELATION_GOAL -> goal_satisfaction); the item STARTED FAR_FROM, not already inside or near (initial_state, from the authored r0 FAR_FROM endpoint); it ENDED INSIDE (terminal_state + relation_transitions); and one CONTAINMENT_CHANGE event is present (event_presence). The far-start sibling of object_inside_container_relation_event (NEAR start): RLBench PutItemInDrawer carries the item in from across the table, so the bottom/middle drawer episodes start FAR_FROM while the top drawer starts NEAR -- the two targets partition the real episodes by their observed initial condition.
addedOverTerminalOnly: relations(authored FAR_FROM r0 + INSIDE r1) -> contributes initial_state(FAR_FROM) + terminal_state(INSIDE)
pilotMetadata.enforcedVsAuthoring: CRITICAL: a 'born-inside' episode is rejected by initial_state (its FIRST relation is INSIDE, not FAR_FROM), NOT by relation_transitions/event_presence -- csg/rollout_extract.py seeds prev_rel='NEAR' UNCONDITIONALLY so even a born-inside item emits a NEAR->INSIDE CONTAINMENT_CHANGE. The authored event delta keeps fromRelation=NEAR (the seed value the extractor emits); event_presence checks only the (kind, objects) signature, not the delta endpoints, so the authored FAR_FROM r0 and the NEAR delta are consistent under the matcher. ENFORCED: terminal INSIDE, INSIDE achieved (relation_transitions), initial FAR_FROM endpoint (initial_state), CONTAINMENT_CHANGE present (event_presence). event_order stays support 0 (one event). AUTHORING ONLY: timeSpan magnitudes, confidences, geometry source/category, representative object sizes.
pilotMetadata.deferredNote: Asserting gripper-contact or causal order is deferred to a later target until honestly evidenced without weakening leakage discipline. RLBench does emit grasp/contact/co-motion/release events here (it has a real gripper), but this target deliberately asserts only relation/event semantics.
pilotMetadata.source: RLBench PutItemInDrawer (bottom/middle variations start FAR_FROM); external simulation leg of the object_inside_container flagship task. Live demos recorded on Runpod/CoppeliaSim by pilots.rlbench.record_put_item_in_drawer; raw sim dumps stay off git. Object sizes here are representative; the container volume in each rollout is the success proximity sensor's pose + extents.
pilotMetadata.notAGoldTask: Pilot diagnostic, deliberately NOT added to gold_tests/. Read it for placed-from-outside relation-event mappability from an external simulator, not as a full object_inside_container acceptance test.
